name: funnel
description: A comprehensive AI agent skill for building and optimizing marketing and sales funnels. Covers funnel design, measurement, conversion optimization, onboarding, email sequences, experimentation, and retention for SaaS and digital businesses.
author: AGIstack

capabilities.funnel_diagnosis: Identifies the highest-leverage drop-off point from conversion data
capabilities.measurement_framework: Builds instrumentation and tracking for every funnel stage
capabilities.copy_writing: Writes high-converting copy for landing pages, emails, and CTAs at every stage
capabilities.onboarding_design: Designs activation sequences that get users to value faster
capabilities.experimentation: Designs and analyzes A/B tests that produce reliable learning
capabilities.retention_connection: Links retention metrics back to funnel decisions and acquisition promises

heartbeat.daily: Core conversion metrics pulse and anomaly detection
heartbeat.weekly: Full funnel health review by stage
heartbeat.monthly: Deep funnel analysis with cohort and unit economics review
heartbeat.quarterly: Strategy review and highest-leverage optimization prioritization
heartbeat.per_experiment: Design and analysis framework for every test

audience: SaaS founders optimizing self-serve growth funnels
Growth marketers responsible for conversion rate improvement
Product managers owning activation and onboarding metrics
Marketing teams running paid acquisition who need funnel visibility
Early-stage companies building their first measurement framework
